title_header: Episode 1: The First Step on a Weary Road

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The Murim Alliance, once a beacon of unity, now crumbles under the weight of internal strife and external threats. In this age of chaos, a lone figure walks the desolate paths, carrying the legacy of a forgotten sect.

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another day, another stretch of road. The dust of the Central Plains clings to my robes, just as the weariness clings to my soul.

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) Wudang's teachings speak of tranquility and balance, yet the world outside is anything but. How can one find peace when injustice festers at every turn?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: RUSTLE

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: What's this commotion?

dialogue.speaker: THUG 1
dialogue.line: Hand over your grain, old man! The Iron Fist Gang needs its tribute!

dialogue.speaker: FARMER
dialogue.line: Please, we barely have enough to feed our children! This is all we have left!

dialogue.speaker: THUG 2
dialogue.line: Silence, you worm! Or do you want a taste of my fist?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIP! SMACK!

dialogue.speaker: FARMER
dialogue.line: AARGH!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) The Iron Fist Gang... another petty group preying on the weak. It seems my path rarely deviates from such encounters.

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: Is this how the strong conduct themselves? By terrorizing the defenseless?

dialogue.speaker: THUG 1
dialogue.line: Who the hell are you?! Get lost, stranger, unless you want to end up like this old fool!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: I am merely a passerby. But even a passerby cannot ignore such blatant cruelty.

dialogue.speaker: THUG 3
dialogue.line: Heh, a righteous hero, are we? Boys, teach this busybody a lesson!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CLANG! WHOOSH!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) Their movements are crude, their intent malicious. A stark contrast to the flowing grace of Wudang's Taiji Sword Form.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWACK! CRACK!

dialogue.speaker: THUG 1
dialogue.line: GAH! My arm!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: Your 'Iron Fists' seem rather brittle.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWISH! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: THUG 2
dialogue.line: He's fast! Too fast!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) I must be careful not to take a life. Wudang's path is not one of wanton destruction, but of correction.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHIRL! BAM!

dialogue.speaker: THUG LEADER
dialogue.line: Who dares interfere with the Iron Fist Gang?! I am 'Iron Palm' Guk Jin!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: Another 'Iron' title. Your gang seems to have a theme. Unfortunately, your strength does not match your moniker.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FWOOSH! CRACKLE!

dialogue.speaker: IRON PALM GUK JIN
dialogue.line: You'll regret that! Take this! Iron Mountain Crush!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) A direct, powerful strike. Lacking subtlety, but not entirely without force.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! SHIFT! THUD!

dialogue.speaker: IRON PALM GUK JIN
dialogue.line: What?! How did he evade that?!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: Your 'mountain' is easily circumnavigated. True strength lies not in brute force, but in adaptability.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: SWOOP! TAP! GROAN!

dialogue.speaker: IRON PALM GUK JIN
dialogue.line: AARGH! My pressure points! I can't move!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: Consider this a lesson. Harass these villagers again, and the next 'tap' will be far less forgiving.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THUD! THUD! (Thugs collapsing)

dialogue.speaker: FARMER
dialogue.line: Thank you, noble warrior! You saved us!

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: No thanks are needed. Seek justice where you can, and do not lose hope.

dialogue.speaker: JINMU
dialogue.line: (Thought) The path of a wandering warrior... it seems it is destined to be a long and arduous one, filled with such encounters. But as long as Wudang's principles guide me, I will not falter.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: With a silent nod, the warrior continues his journey, leaving behind grateful villagers and incapacitated thugs. His steps are light, yet his resolve is heavy, for the Murim awaits his wandering blade.

summary: A lone Wudang warrior, Jinmu, wanders the chaotic Murim. He encounters a group of thugs from the Iron Fist Gang harassing innocent villagers and, despite his desire for peace, intervenes with his refined martial arts, swiftly defeating them and continuing his journey.
